findings.title: Command injection via Command::new in ping endpoint
findings.description: User-supplied host parameter interpolated into format! string passed to Command::new(sh).arg(-c) without sanitization

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in DNS lookup helper
findings.description: Domain parameter passed through helper function into Command::new(sh).arg(-c) via format! string

findings.title: Multi-parameter command injection in log search shell pipeline
findings.description: Three user-controlled parameters interpolated into tail|grep shell pipeline via format! with insufficient quoting

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in archive endpoint
findings.description: Path from JSON body embedded into tar command via format! and Command::new(sh).arg(-c)

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in port check
findings.description: Host parameter from JSON body embedded into nc command via format! and Command::new(sh).arg(-c)

findings.title: Command injection via complex shell pipeline in certificate check
findings.description: Hostname parameter interpolated three times into complex openssl shell pipeline with redirections
